_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing language processing tools to provide feedback to enhance tool development.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and implementing NLP evaluation pipelines that measure task-specific performance, robustness, and fairness.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-011 (AI, cosine: 0.542), AI-T-009 (AI, cosine: 0.519).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, development, enhance, feedback, language, processing] vs WIDAI-only terms [designing, evaluation, fairness, implementing, measure, nlp] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.890, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in analyzing language processing tools to provide feedback to enhance tool" and "Skill in designing and implementing NLP evaluation pipelines that measure task-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.576 > STS 0.495 (gap +0.081). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, development, enhance, feedback, language, processing]. WIDAI-only: [designing, evaluation, fairness, implementing, measure, nlp].

signals.detail: STS 0.495 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
